results.title: New Xbox Game Pass games may be on hold if Microsoft freezes publishing deals
results.description: A new report suggests that the library of Xbox Game Pass games could shrink. A Caboodle Games representative claims that Microsoft is pausing deals with third-party studios. The company recently reduced the price of the subscription service, but also removed new Call of Duty titles.

results.title: Jannik Sinner opens Wimbledon defense as odds-on title favorite
results.description: Jannik Sinner will begin his second consecutive Grand Slam as the odds-on favorite in the men's draw, and will be hoping for a better result this time around.

results.title: Jan 14, 2026; Indianapolis, Indiana, USA; Indiana Pacers guard Tyrese Haliburton (0) reacts to a dunk in the second half against the Toronto Raptors at Gainbridge Fieldhouse. Mandatory Credit: Trevor Ruszkowski-Imagn Images
results.description: Tyrese Haliburton and Chad Buchanan have provided a new injury update for the All-NBA guard. Here's the latest on his recovery timeline and what it means for Indiana heading into the new season.

results.title: Woman, 78, killed by rolling SUV in Port St. Lucie driveway
results.description: A 78-year-old woman died after a parked SUV rolled backward and struck her in a Port St. Lucie driveway.
